title: GCP SM: empty ?version= param passes URI validation
description: validate_url_path_component("", "version") returns Ok because "".bytes().all(...) is vacuously true. A URI like secretx://gcp-sm/proj/secret?version= passes from_uri and generates a malformed REST URL .../versions/:access at runtime instead of returning InvalidUri at construction time. Fix: add an explicit empty-string check in validate_url_path_component, or check before calling it for version.
